message:
feat(cli): enable hashline_edit in default tool set

Adds hashline_edit to the default --tools list so it's available
without explicit opt-in. Updates the default from "read,bash,edit,write"
to "read,bash,edit,write,hashline_edit". Adjusts two test assertions
(default_tools and full_defaults) to match the new default.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
